languages.text: "Сплоченность ведет к увеличению потенциала. Целое больше отдельных его частей. Но откуда происходит стремление держаться вместе? Ответ крайне прост".
"Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."
languages.original_text: "Сплоченность ведет к увеличению потенциала. Целое больше отдельных его частей. Но откуда происходит стремление держаться вместе? Ответ крайне прост".

traits.locale_text: "Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."
"Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."
"Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."

languages.text: 「結束は潜在能力を高める。全体は個々の部分より大きい。しかし、一体になるという衝動はどこから来るのか？その答えは非常に単純だ」
languages.original_text: "Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."

traits.locale_text: 「結束は潜在能力を高める。全体は個々の部分より大きい。しかし、一体になるという衝動はどこから来るのか？その答えは非常に単純だ。」

languages.text: “凝聚力能提升潜能，所谓整体大于其各部分之和。然而，这种与众人团结一致的冲动，究竟从何而来？答案再简单不过。”
languages.original_text: "Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."

traits.locale_text: “凝聚力能提升潜能，所谓整体大于其各部分之和。然而，这种与众人团结一致的冲动，究竟从何而来？答案再简单不过。”

languages.text: «La cohesión conduce a un aumento del potencial. El conjunto es más que la suma de sus partes, pero ¿de dónde procede la necesidad de unirse? La respuesta es extremadamente simple».
languages.original_text: "Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."

traits.locale_text: «La cohesión conduce a un aumento del potencial. El conjunto es más que la suma de sus partes, pero ¿de dónde procede la necesidad de unirse? La respuesta es extremadamente simple».

languages.text: "Kohäsion führt zu größerem Potenzial. Das Ganze ist größer als seine Einzelteile. Aber woher kommt der Drang, zusammenzustehen? Die Antwort ist ausgesprochen einfach."
languages.original_text: "Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."

traits.locale_text: "Kohäsion führt zu größerem Potenzial. Das Ganze ist größer als seine Einzelteile. Aber woher kommt der Drang, zusammenzustehen? Die Antwort ist ausgesprochen einfach."

languages.text: « La cohésion augmente le potentiel. L'ensemble est plus fort que ses composants pris individuellement. Mais d'où vient ce besoin d'unir nos forces ? La réponse est on ne peut plus simple. »
languages.original_text: "Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."

traits.locale_text: « La cohésion augmente le potentiel. L'ensemble est plus fort que ses composants pris individuellement. Mais d'où vient ce besoin d'unir nos forces ? La réponse est on ne peut plus simple. »

languages.text: "Uyum, potansiyelin artmasına yol açar. Bütün, tek tek parçalarından daha büyüktür. Peki birlikte durma dürtüsü nereden geliyor? Cevap son derece basit."
